title: Deep Learning for [Domain] — Springer SSWC 2024
abstract: Published at Springer Smart Systems and Wireless Communication (SSWC) 2024. Applied deep learning architectures to real-world classification problems, demonstrating measurable improvements over baseline approaches on benchmark datasets.

title: Deep Learning Application — ICEMSSD 2024
abstract: Published at International Conference on Emerging Materials, Sustainable Systems and Devices (ICEMSSD) 2024. Extended prior deep learning methodology to a new domain, contributing reproducible experiments and open methodology to applied AI literature.
